required_operator_inputs: repair the public Explaino Projection-and-Flow control surface so root spread and phase strength become materially authoritative and seed / seed fraction have isolated one-at-a-time runtime sensitivity proof
keep the repair bounded to Explaino Projection-and-Flow control authority rather than hiding controls, reopening color-pipeline expansion, or widening into a broad engine refactor
preserve FractalSampleResult and SampleFractalPoints as the shipped legacy projection surfaces while the control-authority repair lands

close only with focused native proof, runtime publish, one-at-a-time published-runtime sensitivity proof, hostile audit, checkpoint commit, machine receipts, clean tree, and the committed-head stale-plan gate
forbidden_operator_prompts: claim root spread or phase strength work on explaino_projection_and_flow while they remain dead or persistence-only
treat bundled multi-control capture differences, persistence, or round-tripping as proof of control authority
hide, remove, or de-scope the surfaced controls as the primary fix
replace SampleFractalPoints or FractalSampleResult instead of preserving the shipped legacy projection path
widen this slice into color-pipeline work, ExplainO-BalanceVoid, meta-basin, Operator-Itinerary, DSL/program-space, renderer replacement, or a generic engine refactor
close the slice without commit, machine receipts, hostile-audit proof, runtime publish, published-runtime proof, and a committed-head stale-plan reread
